creator: gneff@trioptimum.com
text:
The latest update to these ports leave the problem un-affected:

gneff@gneffpc-/w$ pkg_info | grep Pidgin
libpurple-2.3.1     Backend library for the Pidgin multi-protocol messaging
cli
pidgin-2.3.1        Pidgin multi-protocol messaging client (GTK+ UI)
pidgin-encryption-3.0_3 Encryption Plugin for the Pidgin instant messenger
client
gneff@gneffpc-/w$


(10:53:33) pidgin-encryption: Compiled with Purple '2.3.1', running with
Purple '2.3.1'.
(10:53:33) pidgin-encryption: Checking for old prefs file
(/home/gneff/.purple/encrypt.prefs)...
(10:53:33) pidgin-encryption: plugin_load called
(10:53:33) pidgin-encryption: Initializing NSS without Purple support
Assertion failure: lock != NULL, at
../../.././../pr/src/pthreads/ptsynch.c:205
Abort trap: 6 (core dumped)

-G

-- 
/*
* Glen R. J. Neff
* gneff at trioptimum dot com
*
* "They that can give up essential liberty to obtain a little
* temporary safety deserve neither liberty nor safety."
*                 -- Benjamin Franklin, 1759
*/
